Control appears clear. 1.9 compass cal. blustery conditions make for difficult boat control. GPS quality of 5 (flaoting RTK), but with losses mis measurment. Large directional bias observed with GPS as reference, used BT.Extrap recommends constant/no slip/0.1667 for measurement. This makes a -4.58% difference and produces a Q of 70.6. It recommended power/power/0.1667 for transect 0 and constant/no slip/0.4395 for transect 1. If this applied the total Q becomes 70.3. Applied the average recommendation (constant/no slip/0.1667). Sources:Import
